# PERF-202 negative: compact json.Marshal in a request handler
lang: go
file: PERF-202-safe.go
variant: stdlib
---
package sample

import (
	"encoding/json"
	"net/http"
	"strconv"
)

type Response struct {
	Name string `json:"name"`
}

func Handle(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	out, _ := json.Marshal(Response{Name: "x"})
	w.Header().Set("Content-Length", strconv.Itoa(len(out)))
	w.Header().Set("Content-Type", "application/json")
	w.Write(out)
}
